problem.title: The Experience Gap is Blocking Your First Real Job
problem.subtitle: Why do graduates struggle to get jobs?
problem.heroSubtitle: Theoretical knowledge isn't enough — you need real projects, real tools, and team experience to get hired.
problem.ctaText: Want to close this gap now?
problem.gapDesc: Strong theoretical knowledge, but no real-world examples to show employers.
problem.fearDesc: You hesitate when working with real projects or merging code into live systems.
problem.methodologyDesc: You don't know how to work in an Agile team or use company tools.

journey.title: Trainee Journey — From Training to Employment in 6 Weeks
journey.subtitle: A practical roadmap with daily tasks, real tools, and presentable deliverables for employers.

stages.title: Onboarding
stages.desc: Work environment setup, account configuration, and team introduction.
stages.longDesc: An introductory week to prepare the trainee for real work: setting up project accounts, configuring the development environment, introducing tools (Git, Jira, Azure DevOps), and granting access permissions. Includes orientation sessions with the mentor and team lead plus an initial task list for a smooth start.

stages.title: Learning Sprint
stages.desc: Short tasks with daily evaluations and code reviews.
stages.longDesc: A series of short, focused tasks with daily deliverables: hands-on exercises, coding challenges, and immediate code reviews. The goal is to build confidence in writing code and working to team standards.

stages.title: Project Kickoff
stages.desc: Team formation, task breakdown, and kickoff on a simulation project.
stages.longDesc: Forming small teams, breaking tasks into user stories, defining the Definition of Done, and beginning execution of first tasks under a mentor engineer with periodic reviews.

stages.title: Real Workflow
stages.desc: Daily tasks in an Agile team, Scrum meetings, and code reviews.
stages.longDesc: Daily work in an Agile team: Scrum meetings, task management in Jira/Azure DevOps, formal code reviews, and merging changes via feature branches. This phase mirrors the pace of real work and prepares the trainee for job responsibilities.

stages.title: CI/CD & Finalization
stages.desc: Pipeline setup, testing, and trial deployment.
stages.longDesc: Setting up integration and delivery pipelines: writing automated tests, configuring the pipeline, executing a trial deployment to a staging environment, and monitoring performance. Trainees learn to ensure code quality and deployment stability.

stages.title: Demo Day & Hiring Prep
stages.desc: Project presentation, final evaluation, and building a presentable portfolio.
stages.longDesc: A final project presentation before an evaluation committee and job market representatives, portfolio review, interview preparation session, and an employment follow-up plan. The goal is for trainees to leave with presentable materials and follow-up job opportunities.

success.title: Our Trainees' Voices
success.subtitle: Real experiences from trainees who moved from training to real jobs after completing the program.

stories.name: Reem Al-Otaibi
stories.position: Frontend Developer — Currently employed at a tech company
stories.quote: By the grace of God and this program, I became capable of working in a real professional environment. It wasn't easy at first — I was scared of Code Review and the new tools. But the team was supportive, the tasks were clear, and the feedback was constructive. Just two weeks after finishing the program, I landed my first job as a Frontend Developer.

stories.name: Ayman Al-Mahmoud
stories.position: Backend Developer — Moved from theoretical training to a real production environment
stories.quote: I always wondered: how do companies really work? What's the difference between what I learned in courses and what happens on the ground? Mawthiq answered that practically. I worked in a real Agile team, used Azure DevOps, and conducted my first Code Review. Now I have projects to show in interviews, and I got hired by the first company I applied to.

stories.name: Noura Al-Zahrani
stories.position: Full Stack Developer — Received a job offer before completing the program
stories.quote: What distinguished Mawthiq was that it wasn't just education — it was real work with real responsibilities. Every sprint had a goal, every task had a clear deliverable. I participated in building a complete project from scratch to deployment, and I gained experience you can't get from years of watching tutorials. I received a job offer two weeks before the program ended.

stories.name: Mohammed Al-Sharif
stories.quote: I was working in a completely different field and decided to switch my career to tech. Many told me it was hard without experience. But Mawthiq gave me that experience. From the first week I started understanding how real teams work. I learned CI/CD, Docker, and Git Workflows practically. Today I work as a DevOps Junior at a startup, and I feel I truly deserve this position.

stories.name: Sara Al-Qahtani
stories.position: Mobile Developer — From university graduate to tech employee in two months
stories.quote: I graduated from university with good theoretical knowledge, but I didn't know how to work in a team or use real work environment tools. At Mawthiq I learned how to write code that's ready for review, how to contribute to a Sprint, and how to handle Merge Conflicts in front of the team. This is what made my CV stand out from all my fellow graduates.

contact.title: Contact us and ask about everything that matters to you
contact.subtitle: Whether you're a company looking for partnerships, a trainee seeking practical opportunities, or a trainer wanting to join as a mentor — we're here to listen and guide you.
contact.paragraph: Tell us what you need and we'll respond with a clear plan within 48 hours. We differentiate between the needs of companies, trainees, and trainers to provide a customized response: training offers, employment opportunities, or teaching collaboration. Fill the form on the right — one simple step closer to your solution.
contact.trust: Fast response rate; dedicated support; complete information confidentiality.
contact.variantA: Tell us about your need and we'll provide a customized solution within 48 hours.
contact.variantB: Looking for practical training or a hiring partner? Fill the form and we'll get back with clear steps.
